zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Bardolf於1167年出生在英國多瑟特時，她的父親Lord Hugh Bardolf23歲，母親Isabel de Condet26歲。她於大約1185年與Robert Fitz Payne在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年6月18日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾 安德 盧斯可享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Bardolf于1167年出生在英国多瑟特时，她的父亲Lord Hugh Bardolf23岁，母亲Isabel de Condet26岁。她于大约1185年与Robert Fitz Payne在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年6月18日在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾 安德 盧斯可享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Bardolf was born in 1167, in Dorset, England, her father, Lord Hugh Bardolf, was 23 and her mother, Isabel de Condet, was 26. She married Robert Fitz Payne about 1185, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 18 June 1246, in Codnor and Loscoe, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Bardolf est née en 1167, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh Bardolf, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Condet, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Fitz Payne environ 1185, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1246, à Codnor and Loscoe, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ko.Codnor, Basford, Derbyshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너 앤드 로스코
ko.lifeSummary: Maud Bardolf(이)가 1167년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh Bardolf(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Condet(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 영국에서 Robert Fitz Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 6월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너 앤드 로스코에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Bardolf nasceu em 1167, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Hugh Bardolf, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Condet, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Fitz Payne aproximadamente 1185, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1246, em Codnor and Loscoe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.Codnor, Basford, Derbyshire, England: коднор анд лоско, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Bardolf родилась в 1167 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Hugh Bardolf было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Condet, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Fitz Payne около 1185 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 июня 1246 г. в местности коднор анд лоско, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.
